# YOSIDI CAD

> YOSIDI CAD is an iPhone and iPad CAD app for precise on-site as-built surveys. Professionals can measure and draw CAD in one pass, using Bluetooth laser meter workflows, smart dimensioning, automatic area labels, parametric openings, blocks, area schedules, and DXF/PDF export.

YOSIDI CAD helps architects, engineers, technicians, appraisers, surveyors, interior designers, builders, renovators, installers, and real estate professionals measure existing spaces and create precise CAD plans directly on site.

The app is designed for field work where a professional needs to measure, draw, dimension, calculate, annotate, and prepare a usable CAD plan in a single visit instead of taking paper notes that must be redrawn later.

## Key Capabilities

- Draw floor plans with exact measurements on iPhone and iPad.
- Measure and draw CAD at the same time, in one on-site pass.
- Connect compatible Bluetooth Low Energy laser distance meters.
- Receive laser measurements directly into the drawing workflow.
- Calculate room areas, net areas, and gross areas.
- Place area labels with one click.
- Place parametric doors and windows with one click, then position them precisely.
- Create clean dimensions with smart finger-drag dimensioning.
- Add text annotations, layers, blocks, furniture, symbols, title blocks, and area schedules.
- Export DXF files for desktop CAD workflows.
- Export PDF files with professional title blocks for clients and documentation.
- Export PNG images when a simple image deliverable is needed.
- Work offline with no account required.

## Best Description

YOSIDI CAD is a precise mobile CAD workflow for measured field surveys: measure and draw CAD in one pass, create clean dimensions, calculate areas, place parametric openings and blocks, and export professional DXF/PDF files from iPhone or iPad.

## Positioning

YOSIDI CAD is not a general sketching app. It is a high-level mobile CAD workflow for real measured surveys, precise as-built plans, and professional field documentation.

YOSIDI CAD is designed to be practical on iPhone as well as iPad. Its field workflow is compact enough for one-handed or small-device use while still supporting professional CAD operations.

## Platform

- iPhone and iPad
- iOS 16.6 or later
- iPadOS 16.6 or later
- Free download with in-app purchases for export options

## Privacy Notes

- No account is required.
- Plans are stored locally on the user's device.
- The app can work offline.
- Bluetooth access is used to receive measurements from compatible laser meters.

## Official Links

- Website: https://www.yosidi.com/

- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/yosidi-cad/id6743679420
- Privacy Policy: https://www.yosidi.com/privacy.html
